quality vector and a soft-floor truth gate, added 20 adversarial tasks to pull the top of the leaderboard apart, hardened the closed-book sandbox, and surfaced real per-pillar data on the site."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-8 space-y-6","children":[["$","section","Scoring",{"children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-serif text-lg text-ink","children":"Scoring"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-2 list-disc space-y-1.5 pl-5 text-sm leading-relaxed text-ink/85","children":[["$","li","0",{"children":"New composite: composite_v3 = (0.5 + 0.5 × quote_match) × Σ w_d · score_d across 6 quality dims (coverage, depth, rigor, style, checklist, spec)."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"Soft-floor replaces the hard multiplicative gate — broken citations no longer zero out an entire report, but quote_match still scales the result."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"Three new LLM-judge verifiers (depth, rigor, style), each 5-point rubric with self-consistency (3× temp 0.3, median), CoT disabled."}],["$","li","3",{"children":"New ArenaEvaluator (src/eval/evaluator.py) exposes a callable reward function for downstream RL training loops."}]]}]]}],["$","section","Separability",{"children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-serif text-lg text-ink","children":"Separability"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-2 list-disc space-y-1.5 pl-5 text-sm leading-relaxed text-ink/85","children":[["$","li","0",{"children":"Current leaderboard separability measured at 62.86% — 2.14 pp below the 65% intermediate target."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"20 adversarial tasks generated across 3 families (causal/debunking, synthesis-under-contradiction, long-tail recall) to stress the new dims."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"Top-pair densification (--strategy top-pair-densify) added to the battle runner; n=20 per top pair drops CI half-width from ~70 to ~25 Elo."}]]}]]}],["$","section","Sandbox",{"children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-serif text-lg text-ink","children":"Sandbox"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-2 list-disc space-y-1.5 pl-5 text-sm leading-relaxed text-ink/85","children":[["$","li","0",{"children":"New --strict-sandbox flag enforces the closed-book contract at three layers: per-adapter tool allowlist, shim-level 403 gate on non-localhost URLs, and post-run domain audit."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"Closed the ClaudeCode Bash-curl gap by replacing the disallowlist with --allowed-tools Bash(curl http://localhost*)."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"OpenCode now ships a per-run opencode.json with commands.allowed rather than relying on a soft prompt."}],["$","li","3",{"children":"8 runners are strict-eligible end-to-end; 9 others remain best-effort via the shim and audit layers."}]]}]]}],["$","section","Human alignment",{"children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-serif text-lg text-ink","children":"Human alignment"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-2 list-disc space-y-1.5 pl-5 text-sm leading-relaxed text-ink/85","children":[["$","li","0",{"children":"Pairwise A/B preference collector lives at tools/human_pref_collector/ (vanilla HTML + 50-LOC stdlib server, keyboard shortcuts a/s/d)."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"Bradley-Terry weight fit via softmax reparameterization + L-BFGS-B (16 restarts); 5-fold CV refuses to publish weights worse than uniform baseline."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"Targets Spearman ≥ 0.85 with humans on composite ranking once ≥ 200 preferences land."}]]}]]}],["$","section","Site",{"children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-serif text-lg text-ink","children":"Site"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-2 list-disc coverage, checklist, spec, reachability, quote_match) with hover tooltips."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"New Quality Profile card on each agent's detail page."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"New “Deepest reports” highlight tile on the homepage."}],["$","li","3",{"children":"Dry-run banner renders when the leaderboard data is synthetic so visitors are not misled by placeholder 6:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","2",{"children":"Changelog — Deep Research Arena"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"description","content":"A log of meaningful changes to the Deep Research Arena benchmark, scoring system, and site."}],["$","meta","4",{"property":"og:title","content":"Deep Research Arena"}],["$","meta","5",{"property":"og:description","content":"The reproducible Elo benchmark for Deep Research agents."}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:type","content":"website"}],["$","meta","7",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary"}],["$","meta","8",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Deep Research Arena"}],["$","meta","9",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"The reproducible Elo benchmark for Deep Research agents."}],["$","meta","10",{"name":"next-size-adjust"}]]
1:null
